Levator Ani m.
(Iliococcygeus, Pubococcygeus, and Puborectalis mm.)

title: Superior View of Pelvic Cavity

attribution: @MarkAAbbott1 Modified from Anatomy & Physiology Revealed 4.0. © 2022 McGraw Hill. *Puborectalis m. may also be supplied by inferior rectal n. (inferior anal n.) and/or perineal branches of pudendal n.
